name: Build Orders tab shows quantity, status, and creation dates for builds
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly' has two build orders: 'BO-001' with status 'Production' for quantity 10 and 'BO-002' with status 'Complete' for quantity 5
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly' and clicks the 'Build Orders' tab
Then the build orders table displays 'BO-001' with status 'Production' and quantity 10, and 'BO-002' with status 'Complete' and quantity 5
